summary_text: **Findings (severity-ordered)** - **High**: Notion-controller precedence for thumbnail QA is runtime-critical but not directly tested end-to-end. Runtime uses Notion as base and only supplements local `image_path/reply_url`, not thumbnail flags ([scheduler.py#L429-L463](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L429), [scheduler.py#L450](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L450)). Gate enforcement is strict ([scheduler.py#L299-L308](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L299)), and quarantine demotes invalid approved rows ([scheduler.py#L345-L372](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py#L345)). Current tests cover gate/quarantine in isolation ([test_scheduler_gate1.py#L198-L223](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py#L198)) but not Notion-vs-local conflict behavior. - **Medium**: Notion sync intentionally excludes thumbnail fields from routine dirty push ([notion_sync.py#L369-L382](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L369), [notion_sync.py#L547-L550](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L547)). That is consistent with “Notion controls content,” but there is no explicit test locking this contract. - **Medium**: `apply_post_package` can still persist an approved row while bypassing blockers or tolerating image-sync failure (`--allow-blockers`, `--allow-partial`) ([apply_post_package.py#L251-L254](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/apply_post_package.py#L251), [apply_post_package.py#L289-L297](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/apply_post_package.py#L289), covered in [test_apply_post_package.py#L189-L217](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_apply_post_package.py#L189), [test_apply_post_package.py#L602-L637](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_apply_post_package.py#L602)). Missing test: scheduler-side controller reconciliation after this path. - **Medium**: Offline fallback safety is tested ([test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L516-L531](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_r11_r12.py#L516)), but rejoin/reconcile semantics (offline local approval → Notion recovery with conflicting QA flags) are not. **Minimal high-value tests to add** - `test_post_due_jobs_notion_thumbnail_flags_override_local_cache`: Notion row has `approved` + failing thumbnail flags; local cache has passing flags for same `notion_page_id`. Assert scheduler quarantines/fails from Notion state (controller behavior), not local. - `test_merge_notion_diff_does_not_preserve_local_thumbnail_metadata`: local has passing thumbnail metadata, remote has failing/default values. Assert merged record follows remote thumbnail fields. - `test_push_updates_to_notion_never_sends_thumbnail_fields_in_routine_sync`: set fake local thumbnail mutations + dirty operational fields, assert PATCH payload contains only Status/Scheduled/Force Post. - `test_offline_to_online_reconcile_quarantines_previously_local_approved_post`: cycle 1 offline uses local; cycle 2 Notion restored with failing thumbnail flags. Assert post is demoted before due posting and persisted as failed.
